name: vibe-slides
description: Author academic slide decks via a markdown DSL: extract theme/components from a .pptx template, iterate on a content-only outline, then compile to .pptx with pptxgenjs.

interface.shortDescription: Author academic slide decks from markdown.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Slides helps build academic-style slide decks by separating content-first markdown authoring from template-driven pptx generation with extracted themes and reusable components.
defaultPrompt: Extract a slide theme from this pptx
